title: Voice Meeting Injection — Stealth Listen and Speak
description: Full pipeline: capture meeting audio/captions, transcribe, inject agent intelligence, generate response via TTS, inject back into audio stream. The 'attend meetings for you' skill.
notes: This is the master orchestration skill. It wires together: caption OCR (input) + Whisper/Gemini (transcription) + agent reasoning (processing) + Kitty TTS (output) + audio injection (delivery). Requires virtual audio device or screen capture for input.

steps.note: Step 1: Start caption OCR to read live meeting captions from screen.
Step 2: If audio available, run parallel Whisper transcription for higher accuracy.
Step 3: Feed transcript to agent for processing. Agent reads context, generates intelligent response.
Step 4: Convert agent response to speech via TTS.
Step 5: Inject synthesized speech into meeting audio stream (virtual audio device or speaker).
Step 6: Archive full transcript + agent responses as meeting evidence.
